title: 2021 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This Federal Reserve webpage is a navigation index listing links to all FOMC statements and projection materials released during 2021 (January, March, April, June, July, September, November, and December). It does not contain the actual FOMC statement text or substantive policy content—only references to separate linked documents.
key_points: This is a listing/index page containing links to 8 separate FOMC statement dates in 2021: January 27, March 17, April 28, June 16, July 28, September 22, November 3, and December 15.
The page also references 4 economic projection releases associated with the March, June, September, and December FOMC meetings.
The page includes a separate link regarding 'Repurchase Agreement Arrangements' from July 28, 2021.
One link references a January 27, 2021 reaffirmation of the 'Statement on Longer-Run Goals and Monetary Policy Strategy'.
Last Update shown on page: February 26, 2026.
No actual FOMC statement text, voting records, or policy content is present in this source.
why_it_matters: This source cannot serve as a standalone archive record because it contains no substantive policy text. It is a directory page requiring navigation to individual linked documents to access actual FOMC statements. For archival purposes, each linked statement should be processed separately.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per Rule 5 - must be rejected
Source contains no substantive policy content, only links to separate documents
event_type is 'unknown' which is technically correct given no policy content exists, but confirms this is not a valid archive target

notes: NON-ARCHIVABLE: This is a listing/navigation page that aggregates links to 2021 FOMC press releases. Per CORE RULE 6, listing pages are non-archiveable. The actual archiveable content resides in the individually linked pages. Recommend crawling each FOMC statement date as separate source documents for the archive. The source is historically relevant (2021 FOMC meetings) but the page itself provides no extractable policy content.
